feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ME21 Incoterms is missing
entry.content:
Dear Experts:

After upgrading to S4, the Incoterms field for t-code: ME21 is missing.

How do I restore the Incoterms field for S4 ME21?

Please help to check attached file for detail.

Regards,Joanne

entry.title: Asset Accounting Depreciation varience issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working in SAP S/4HANA 2023 version.

We are facing an issue in Asset Accounting. After changing the depreciation key and useful life of an asset, the recalculated depreciation is not reflecting correctly.

We have changed useful life of asset 20 to 15 years but still the depreciation is calculating for 20 years.

Kindly provide the solution.

Thanks & Regards,

Fi& Co consultant.

entry.title: Display Notifications List(IW29) Fiori App- There is no Spreadsheet option to downloadd
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

Issue is quite simple.

IW29 Display PM Notifications Fiori App. not showing the option- Spreadsheet when try to download, it's happening in our QA@ Quality system, but this is there in our Production(PA1) system. I have attached screengrabs which are self-explanatory.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: F110 Payment Work flow approval request not triggered to the two agents
entry.content:
Is is required to set up two workflow agents to approve a payment in F110 payment run approver workflow.

Standard work flow template - WS23200018 

Two agents were defined in Agent determination for the said payment amount range.

The 2 approvers do get the workflow request to approve the payment proposal, however, after one approver approves the request it passes the whole workflow to proceed to payment even without the approval from the second approver.

Could you please advice how to resolve this.

entry.title: Custom field - Segment is not visible in BP screen
entry.content:
Hi,

one of the custom field which is not visible in BP screen under Vendor general tab. We have diagonised  and checked the field in screen level it repaced under different tab after the 2025 upgrade.  we need your help to fix this issue. Kindly go through the attached document.

entry.title: To configure error messages for costing run
entry.content:
Need to configure below messages as "Error" message for costing run.

These messages are not available in the transaction OPR4_CK.

  1. CK461 : Routing either does not exist or contains no operations
  2. CK858 : No suitable or valid Production version found
  3. CK756 : Material in plant cannot be costed

entry.title: HANAパラメータ設定
entry.content:
お世話になります。

HANA 2.0 SPS08 Rev89のHANAシステムにパラメータを削除したいのですが、設定後に再起動をするとパラメータが復活してしまいます。

こちらのパラメータの意味と削除する方法はどのようにすればいいのでしょうか？

パラメータ：singletenant = yes

 

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed
entry.content:
Hi Team

PO: 4210000053

Company code: SF01

We have observed that all the IR entries associated to this PO were reversed although these were already capitalized. 

Attached the invoice and invoice reversal document numbers and attached the ECQ system configuration details.

Please confirm the tables where data is stored after posting the IR entry for a CWIP asset and after creating the settlement rule in CJIC and specifically the tables where settlement rule data is maintained.

Also, let me know whether we can implement a validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed. Additionally, specify which tables need to be checked for creating this validation.

 

Regards,

Ravi Kiran

entry.title: Cyclic Count issue in MICN transaction
entry.content:
I am using cyclic counting and executing transaction MICN. However, after executing it at the plant and storage location level with the planned count date set as the current date till (31.12.2026), the system is showing some materials as “Cyclic Count Breached.”

The planned count date is marked in red, and these materials have not yet been counted. Additionally, the material creation date does not seem to match with planned date.

Also, could you please confirm the following:
If the A indicator has an interval of 4, will the planning calendar run from April to March, or will it always consider the last PID (Physical Inventory Document) date for scheduling?

entry.title: Not able to add field from system variant to line item
entry.content:
Help to add the above field at item level but unable to add it

  1. Check the field at system variant field in item configuration tab
  2. make the field visible at item level main screen
  1. Business wants to add the detail data in the given field named "GS_MSR_SALES_ITEM-INSPECTION_COMMENT (Comment)  which is required by the customer .

entry.title: Transaction Type (RMVCT) Missing in ACDOCA for TRM & REFX data
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need guidance on the following business scenario:

System: SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud)
Modules in Scope: FI, REFX, TRM, Group Reporting
Out of Scope: Group Reporting Data Collection (GRDC)

Requirement:
We are working on cash flow reporting in Group Reporting using subitems. For this, transaction type–level data (field RMVCT) is required in the ACDOCA table for borrowing, leases, investments, and deposits accounts. The purpose is to automate the cash flow rather updating subitems (transaction types) in Group Reporting manually.

Issue:
Documents posted from TRM and REFX modules are getting recorded in ACDOCA with a blank transaction type field (RMVCT).
As a result, when releasing data from ACDOCA to Group Reporting (using GRPL), the required subitems information is missing.

Ask:
Has anyone encountered a similar issue?Any suggestions on how to ensure that transaction types (RMVCT) are populated for TRM and REFX postings in ACDOCA?
Any other option available to directly get transaction type level information in Group Reporting from ACDOCA for TRM and REFX related data

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: problem occurring at the time of using ABAON
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

when doing asset acquisition posting for multiple assets at a time and error occurs. this we have not received before and last month I did a similar posting without this issue. posting to multiple assets is possible as long as you insert maximum of 5 assets at a time at the moment. attached screenshots of the error message

 Error message: "Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 002 not filled"

 

Kindly help us with this.

entry.title: Message number V1544 during VA02 Sales order item rejection
entry.content:
steps 

  1. VA02 -try to reject Sales Order line item 10 and save the Sales order .VA02 – Change sales order for rejecting Sales order 13040343  item 10.
  2. Getting Error message number V1544.
  3. Exit the Sales Order .
  4. Display Purchase Order number 4634012157 item number 2280 already deleted and marked as delivery completed .

Please review and recommend for successfully rejecting the sales order item .

Attached Document from SQ1 100 test system .

entry.title: Requirement to display custom message on Fiori 3 login page (browser compatibility notice)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have a requirement to display a custom message on the SAP Fiori Launchpad login page (Fiori 3 – /UI2/CL_FIORI3_LOGIN).

We want to show the following message on the login page (above username/password fields):

"SAP FIORI is best compatible with Microsoft Edge Browser"

Regards,
Shilpa.

entry.title: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について
entry.content: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について償却キーの償却開始年月を今月から先月に変更しても先月の償却費が今月の償却費に上乗せされない。

entry.title: generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h
entry.content: Can we generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h , joining two table ACDOCA and CATSDB

entry.title: SQLMD: Cross Node Joins Analysis
entry.content:
When executing SQLMD for Cross Node Join analysis, the program needs an input file containing Tables and Nodes. 

How to generate this file using the data from HANA DB? Wherever I check in System tables/views, this field with Node information is marked as Internal Use only and always return empty result.

So, how to generate the file with Table & Node information required to execute SQLMD?

Thanks

entry.title: Revaluation values for production order
entry.content:
Hello,

The revaluation values posting in the FI document are on 2 lines for each production order: first line has Local Currency and second line has Group Currency values.  For that, KSII and CON2 are used to have the revaluation posting.

Do you know why?

entry.title: Additional “Attributes” button is displayed in CJ8VH variant selection screen after upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We found a screen difference in transaction CJ8VH between the pre-upgrade and post-upgrade environments.

In transaction CJ8VH, when opening the selection variant screen for variant 2025TEST, an additional “Attributes” button with an edit icon is displayed in the application toolbar in the upgraded environment.

  • Pre-upgrade environment: R4M
  • Post-upgrade environment: R3M
  •

entry.title: the way of cerate index
entry.content: 我们想给acdocp新建一个索引，是否直接在hana studio中执行：1、添加索引：CREATE INDEX SAPHANADB.ACDOCP~AUFNR ON SAPHANADB.ACDOCP (MANDT, AUFNR);  即可？
